title: McLaren Racing Announces Major Investment in Sustainable Aviation Fuel Programme in 2024 Sustainability Report
content: McLaren Racing published its annual Sustainability Report 2024, including details of a major investment in Sustainable Aviation Fuel certificates (SAFc).  Mclaren funded one million US gallons of sustainable aviation fuel, covering 100% of business travel emissions across all series and achieved 48% reduction in F1 road freight emissions from switching to biofuel, a direct replacement for diesel which reduces emissions by up to 90%.
author: Analysts Account
